final_choice.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt

variables.notes: Chose the clean total current debt line. Although it may include capitalized leases in some periods, it is the best reported total from the candidate list; avoided adding component rows to prevent double counting.

candidates.why: Exact current taxes payable/current tax liabilities label on the balance sheet.
